title: cimicifuga foetida var. tschonoskii
intro: Cimicifuga foetida var. tschonoskii, also known as Chuanmutong, is a plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidant, and anti-bacterial activities. The health benefits of Chuanmutong include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. In herbal preparations, Chuanmutong is often dried and used in teas, decoctions, or capsules, and its roots are used to make extracts for medicinal purposes.
